message:
feat: support bonus point awards via [bonus] issues (#1376)

The leaderboard generation script now picks up bonus point issues
from kubestellar/console with the 'bonus-points' label.

Format: [bonus] @username +N reason
Only issues created by clubanderson are honored. Close to revoke.

Example: gh issue create --repo kubestellar/console \
  --title '[bonus] @rishi-jat +1000 video challenge' \
  --label bonus-points

Tested: created #5758, verified +1000 applied, closed to revoke.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
